scripts.check-updated-lockfile: pnpm run lock:poetry && git --no-pager diff --color --exit-code -I "\{url = .+, hash = .+\}" uv.lock
scripts.ci:qa: pnpm run check-updated-lockfile && pnpm install:poetry && pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test
scripts.format: uv run ruff format src test
scripts.lint: uv run ruff check src test && uv run ruff format --check src test
scripts.test:unit: uv run pytest -vv --cov=src --cov-report term-missing --cov-report xml -m "not integration"
